name: headerLabel
displayName:
Cookie Banner Generator — Consent Mode v2
Configure default consent states for your cookie banner. Use the Cookie Banner Generator dashboard to customize your banner appearance and behavior.

name: defaultSettings
help: Set default consent states per region. Use ISO 3166-2 country codes (e.g., 'GB', 'DE', 'US-CA'). Comma-separate multiple regions (e.g., 'GB,DE,FR'). Leave region blank for global defaults. For GDPR compliance, EEA/UK regions should default to 'denied'.

param.name: region
param.help: Leave blank for global default. Use ISO 3166-2 codes like 'GB', 'DE', 'US-CA'. Comma-separate multiple: 'GB,DE,FR,IT,ES'

param.name: ad_storage
param.help: Controls whether advertising cookies can be set

param.name: analytics_storage
param.help: Controls whether analytics cookies can be set

param.name: ad_user_data
param.help: Controls whether user data can be sent to Google for advertising

param.name: ad_personalization
param.help: Controls whether personalized advertising is allowed

subParams.name: waitForUpdate
subParams.help: How long (in milliseconds) to wait for the banner to load and check for saved consent before tags fire with default state. Default: 500ms.

subParams.name: consentCookieName
subParams.help: The name of the cookie where Cookie Banner Generator stores the user's consent choice. Default: 'cookie_consent'. Only change this if you've customized it in your banner settings.

subParams.name: ads_data_redaction
subParams.help: When enabled, ad-click identifiers in network requests are redacted when ad_storage is 'denied'. Recommended for maximum GDPR compliance.

subParams.name: url_passthrough
subParams.help: Pass ad-click identifiers (gclid, dclid, etc.) via URL parameters when cookies cannot be used. This helps maintain conversion measurement even when ad_storage is denied.
